name: training-bot-rag-hub
description: Training Bot RAG Hub for Personal Multi Trading Platform

scripts.build: npm --prefix packages/shared run build && npm --prefix apps/api run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix packages/shared run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/api run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix packages/shared run test && npm --prefix apps/api run test
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.db:psql: docker compose exec postgres psql -U rag_user -d rag_hub
